name: @firstpick/pi-skill-acceptance-tester
description_en: Agents should invoke this skill as the final gate before release, handoff, or claiming completion for substantial changes. Runs acceptance/readiness checks, determines pass/fail, and gives a go/no-go recommendation.
description_zh: 代理应在发布、交接或声明完成重大更改之前，作为最终关卡调用此技能。运行验收/就绪检查，确定通过/失败，并提供进行/不进行建议。
